arabic: تَحْتَلُّ الْقُدْسُ مَكَانَةً مُقَدَّسَةً لَدَى أَتْبَاعِ الأَدْيَانِ السَّمَاوِيَّةِ الثَّلَاثَةِ: الإِسْلَامِ وَالْمَسِيحِيَّةِ وَالْيَهُودِيَّةِ.
translation: Jerusalim zauzima sveto mjesto kod sljedbenika tri abrahamske vjere: islama, kršćanstva i judaizma.
translationEn: Jerusalem holds a sacred status for followers of the three Abrahamic religions: Islam, Christianity and Judaism.
